segments.speaker: Synthetic Speaker
segments.text: First, capture the facts. Then weigh the tradeoff, because speed matters. In exchange, we keep one extra review step.

segments.speaker: Synthetic Speaker
segments.text: Before the cleanup, the notes were scattered. After the cleanup, the path was direct. For example, one checklist became one stable runbook.

segments.speaker: Synthetic Speaker
segments.text: Why now? Why this path? Why not later?!
